package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for slice_membership_in_loop_map_candidate: stable membership is checked with repeated slice scans in a loop.
type CaseSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidateDTO struct {
    ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
    Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

func PositiveSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidate(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidateDTO) error {
    allowed := []string{"active", "pending", "paused"}
    matched := 0
    for _, item := range items {
        for _, status := range allowed {
            if item.Status == status {
                matched++
                break
            }
        }
    }
    _ = matched
    return nil
}
